---
title: "Appendix: Supplementary Material for Article 1"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    extra_dependencies: ["pdflscape"]
fontsize: 11pt
params:
  continue_knitting: true
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{pdflscape}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{placeins}
  - \usepackage{chngcntr}
  - \counterwithin{figure}{section}
  - \counterwithin{table}{section}
  - \renewcommand{\thefigure}{\thesection.\arabic{figure}}
  - \renewcommand{\thetable}{\thesection.\arabic{table}}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.pos = 'H')
Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "en_US.UTF-8")

library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(lavaan)
library(stargazer)
library(margins)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(DescTools)
library(dplyr)
library(interactions)
library(car)
library(tseries)
library(forecast)
library(ResourceSelection)
library(caret)
library(multiwayvcov)
library(margins) 
library(fastDummies)
library(psych)
library(haven)
library(purrr)
library(mice)
library(stringr)
library(marginaleffects)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(here)

``` 

\newpage
\appendix

<!-- This file loads the combined, recoded ESS dataset (df) produced by
p1_code_data.R. Key variables: greenvote (voted for a green party),
class8/class16 (Oesch occupational class), eisced2 (harmonized education),
polindex (climate policy support index), and region (country grouping). -->

# Country and Regional Specific Analysis

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

all_countries <- unique(df$cntry)  

count_rounds <- function(var) {
  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[var]])) %>%  
    group_by(cntry) %>%
    summarise(num_rounds = n_distinct(essround), .groups = "drop") %>%
    rename(!!var := num_rounds)  
}

impenv_counts <- count_rounds("impenv")
greenvote_counts <- count_rounds("greenvote")
per501_counts <- count_rounds("per501")
wrclmch_counts <- count_rounds("wrclmch")
polindex_counts <- count_rounds("polindex")

rounds_summary <- tibble(cntry = all_countries) %>%
  left_join(impenv_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(greenvote_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(per501_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(wrclmch_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(polindex_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  replace_na(list(impenv = 0, greenvote = 0, per501 = 0, wrclmch = 0, polindex = 0)) %>%  
  arrange(cntry) 

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = c("AL", "AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", 
            "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE", "IT", "XK", "LV", "LT", "LU", "ME", 
            "MK", "NL", "NO", "PL", "PT", "RO", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE", 
            "CH", "UA", "GB"),
  country = c("Albania", "Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyprus", 
              "Czech Republic", "Denmark", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", 
              "Greece", "Hungary", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Italy", "Kosovo", "Latvia", 
              "Lithuania", "Luxembourg", "Montenegro", "North Macedonia", "Netherlands", 
              "Norway", "Poland", "Portugal", "Romania", "Serbia", "Slovakia", "Slovenia", 
              "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "Ukraine", "United Kingdom")
)


rounds_summary <- rounds_summary %>%
  left_join(country_mapping, by = "cntry") %>%
  select(cntry, country, everything())  

kable(rounds_summary, 
      caption = "Number of ESS rounds with observations per country and variable",
      col.names = c("Country Code", "Country", "ImpEnv", "GreenVote", "Per501", "8,10 and 11", "Round 8"),
      row.names = FALSE,
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), 
                full_width = F, position = "center")
```
\newpage
\begin{landscape}

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

ess_years <- setNames(seq(2002, 2022, by = 2), 1:11)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(cntry = as.character(cntry))

countries1 <- c("AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", 
                "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE", "IT", "LV", "LT", "ME", "NL", "NO", "PL", 
                "PT", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE", "CH", "UA", "GB")

all_countries <- c("AL", "AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", 
                   "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE", "IT", "XK", "LV", "LT", "LU", "ME", 
                   "MK", "NL", "NO", "PL", "PT", "RO", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE", 
                   "CH", "UA", "GB")

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = all_countries,
  country = c("Albania", "Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyprus", 
              "Czech Republic", "Denmark", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", 
              "Greece", "Hungary", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Italy", "Kosovo", "Latvia", 
              "Lithuania", "Luxembourg", "Montenegro", "North Macedonia", "Netherlands", 
              "Norway", "Poland", "Portugal", "Romania", "Serbia", "Slovakia", "Slovenia", 
              "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "Ukraine", "United Kingdom")
)

region_mapping <- tibble(
  country = country_mapping$country,
  region = case_when(
    country %in% c("Denmark",  "Finland", "Iceland", "Norway", "Sweden") ~ "Northern Europe",
    country %in% c("Austria", "Belgium", "France", "Germany", "Ireland", "Luxembourg", 
                   "Netherlands", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom") ~ "Western Europe",
    country %in% c("Cyprus", "Greece", "Italy", "Portugal", "Spain") ~ "Southern Europe",
    country %in% c("Albania", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", 
                   "Hungary", "Kosovo", "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Montenegro", 
                   "North Macedonia", "Poland", "Romania", "Serbia", "Slovakia", 
                   "Slovenia", "Ukraine") ~ "Eastern Europe"
  )
)

fun_m <- function(x, use_cluster = TRUE) {
  formula_str <- "impenv ~ gndr"
  if (use_cluster) formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ factor(essround)")
  
  m <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), weights = pspwght, data = x)
  coeftest_m <- if (use_cluster) coeftest(m, vcov = vcovCL(m, cluster = ~essround)) 
                else coeftest(m, vcov = vcovHC(m, type = "HC1"))
  
  tibble(
    estimate = coeftest_m["gndr", 1],
    std_error = coeftest_m["gndr", 2],
    p_value = coeftest_m["gndr", 4]
  )
}

results_df <- map_dfr(all_countries, function(i) {
  df_i <- df %>% filter(cntry == i)
  use_cluster <- i %in% countries1
  stats <- fun_m(df_i, use_cluster)
  
  tibble(
    cntry = i,
    formatted_output = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)%s", 
                               stats$estimate, 
                               stats$std_error, 
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.01, "∗∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.05, "∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.1, "∗", ""))))
  )
})

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(country_mapping, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(region_mapping, by = "country")

obs_counts <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(impenv)) %>%
  count(cntry, name = "num_obs")

ess_years_df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(impenv)) %>%
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(ess_years = paste(sort(unique(ess_years[as.character(essround)])), collapse = ", ")) %>%
  ungroup()

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(obs_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(ess_years_df, by = "cntry") %>%
  replace_na(list(num_obs = 0, ess_years = "None")) 

results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe", "Eastern Europe"))) %>%
  arrange(region, country)

kable(results_df[, c("country", "formatted_output", "num_obs", "ess_years")], 
      caption = "The effect of gender on environmental concern per country",
      col.names = c("Country", "Coefficient Gender (women)", "Observations", "ESS Years"),
      row.names = FALSE,
      output = "latex", 
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), full_width = F, position = "center", font_size = 7) %>%

  group_rows("Northern Europe", 1, sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe")) %>%
  group_rows("Western Europe", sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe") + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Southern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe")) + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Eastern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe")) + 1, 
             nrow(results_df)) %>%
  
  footnote(general = c("Robust standard errors clustered by ESS round or HC1 in parentheses ∗p<0.1; ∗∗p<0.05; ∗∗∗p<0.01"))

```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

ess_years <- setNames(seq(2002, 2022, by = 2), 1:11)
df <- df %>% drop_na(greenvote) %>% mutate(cntry = as.character(cntry))

countries1 <- c("AT", "BE", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", "HU", "IS",
                   "IE", "LT", "LU", "NL", "NO", "PT", "ES", "SE", "CH", "GB")
all_countries <- c("AT", "BE", "BG", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS",
                   "IE", "IT", "LT", "LU", "NL", "NO", "PT", "SI", "ES", "SE", "CH", "GB")

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = all_countries,
  country = c("Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Cyprus", "Czech Republic", "Denmark",
              "Estonia", "Finland","France", "Germany", "Greece", "Hungary", "Iceland",
              "Ireland", "Italy", "Lithuania", "Luxembourg", "Netherlands", "Norway",
              "Portugal", "Slovenia", "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom")
)

region_mapping <- tibble(
  country = country_mapping$country,
  region = case_when(
    country %in% c("Denmark","Finland", 
                  "Iceland", "Norway", "Sweden") ~ "Northern Europe",
    country %in% c("Austria", "Belgium", "France", "Germany", "Ireland", "Luxembourg", 
                   "Netherlands", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom") ~ "Western Europe",
    country %in% c("Cyprus", "Italy", "Portugal", "Spain", "Greece") ~ "Southern Europe",
    country %in% c("Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Hungary", "Slovenia", "Bulgaria", 
                   "Slovakia", "Lithuania", "Poland") ~ "Eastern Europe"
  )
)


fun_m <- function(x, use_cluster = TRUE) {
  if (nrow(x) == 0) {  
    return(tibble(estimate = NA, std_error = NA, p_value = NA, ame = NA))
  }
  
  formula_str <- "greenvote ~ gndr"
  if (use_cluster) formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ factor(essround)")
  
  m <- tryCatch(glm(as.formula(formula_str), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = pspwght, data = x),
                error = function(e) return(NULL))  
  
  if (is.null(m)) { 
    return(tibble(estimate = NA, std_error = NA, p_value = NA, ame = NA))
  }

  coeftest_m <- tryCatch(
    if (use_cluster) coeftest(m, vcov = vcovCL(m, cluster = ~essround)) 
    else coeftest(m, vcov = vcovHC(m, type = "HC1")),
    error = function(e) return(NULL)
  )
  
  if (is.null(coeftest_m)) return(tibble(estimate = NA, std_error = NA, p_value = NA, ame = NA))

  ame <- tryCatch(margins(m, variables = "gndr"),
                  error = function(e) return(NULL))
  
  mean_ame <- if (!is.null(ame)) round(mean(ame$dydx_gndr, na.rm = TRUE), 2) else NA

  tibble(
    estimate = coeftest_m["gndr", 1],
    std_error = coeftest_m["gndr", 2],
    p_value = coeftest_m["gndr", 4],
    ame = mean_ame
  )
}

results_df <- map_dfr(all_countries, function(i) {
  df_i <- df %>% filter(cntry == i)
  use_cluster <- i %in% countries1
  stats <- fun_m(df_i, use_cluster)
  
  tibble(
    cntry = i,
    formatted_output = if (!is.na(stats$estimate)) sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)%s", 
                                                           stats$estimate, 
                                                           stats$std_error, 
                                                           ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.01, "∗∗∗",
                                                           ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.05, "∗∗",
                                                           ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.1, "∗", ""))))
                      else "NA",
    ame = if (!is.na(stats$ame)) sprintf("%.2f", stats$ame) else "NA"
  )
})

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(country_mapping, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(region_mapping, by = "country")

obs_counts <- df %>%
  count(cntry, name = "num_obs")

ess_years_df <- df %>%
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(ess_years = paste(sort(unique(ess_years[as.character(essround)])), collapse = ", ")) %>%
  ungroup()

greenvote_percent <- df %>%
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(percent_green = round(mean(greenvote == 1) * 100, 1)) %>%
  ungroup()

per501_mean <- df %>%
  filter(greenvote == 1) %>%
  distinct(cntry, essround, per501) %>% 
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(mean_per501 = round(mean(per501, na.rm = TRUE), 2)) %>%
  ungroup()

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(obs_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(ess_years_df, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(per501_mean, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(greenvote_percent, by = "cntry") %>%
  replace_na(list(num_obs = 0, ess_years = "None", percent_green = 0, ame = "0.00", mean_per501 = NA))

results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe", "Eastern Europe"))) %>%
  arrange(region, country)

green_vote_count <- df %>%
  filter(greenvote == 1) %>%
  count(cntry, name = "num_green_votes")

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(green_vote_count, by = "cntry") %>%
  replace_na(list(num_green_votes = 0))


kable(results_df[, c("country", "formatted_output", "ame", "num_obs", "num_green_votes", "percent_green", "ess_years", "mean_per501")], 
      caption = "The effect of gender on voting for a green party per country (logistic regression)", 
      col.names = c("Country", "Coefficient Gender (women)", "AME", "Observations", "Green Votes (n)", "Green Vote (%)", "ESS Years", "Mean PER501"),
      row.names = FALSE,
      output = "latex", 
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), full_width = F, position = "center", font_size = 6) %>%
  group_rows("Northern Europe", 1, sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe")) %>%
  group_rows("Western Europe", sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe") + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Southern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe")) + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Eastern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe")) + 1, 
             nrow(results_df)) %>%
  footnote(general = c("Robust standard errors clustered by ESS round or HC1 in parentheses ∗p<0.1; ∗∗p<0.05; ∗∗∗p<0.01."))

```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = c("AL", "AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", 
            "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE", "IT", "XK", "LV", "LT", "LU", "ME", 
            "MK", "NL", "NO", "PL", "PT", "RO", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE", 
            "CH", "UA", "GB"),
  country = c("Albania", "Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyprus", 
              "Czech Republic", "Denmark", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", 
              "Greece", "Hungary", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Italy", "Kosovo", "Latvia", 
              "Lithuania", "Luxembourg", "Montenegro", "North Macedonia", "Netherlands", 
              "Norway", "Poland", "Portugal", "Romania", "Serbia", "Slovakia", "Slovenia", 
              "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "Ukraine", "United Kingdom")
)

country_region <- country_mapping %>%
  mutate(
    region = case_when(
      country %in% c("Denmark","Finland", "Iceland", "Norway", "Sweden") ~ "Northern Europe",
      country %in% c("Austria", "Belgium", "France", "Germany", "Ireland", "Luxembourg", 
                    "Netherlands", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom") ~ "Western Europe",
      country %in% c("Cyprus", "Italy", "Portugal", "Spain", "Greece") ~ "Southern Europe",
      country %in% c("Albania", "Croatia", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Hungary", "Slovenia", "Bulgaria", "Kosovo",
                     "Latvia", "Montenegro", "North Macedonia", "Romania", "Serbia", "Ukraine", 
                     "Slovakia", "Lithuania", "Poland") ~ "Eastern Europe",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

df_percentage <- df %>%
  drop_na(greenvote) %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  mutate(total = n()) %>%
  group_by(region, greenvote) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), total = first(total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(percent = (count / total) * 100)

country_mean_per501 <- df %>%
  filter(greenvote == 1, !is.na(per501)) %>%
  group_by(cntry, region) %>%
  summarise(mean_per501 = mean(per501, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
mean_per501_region_1 <- country_mean_per501 %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(mean_per501_region_1 = round(mean(mean_per501, na.rm = TRUE), 2), .groups = "drop")


country_mean_rile <- df %>%
  filter(greenvote == 1, !is.na(rile)) %>%
  group_by(cntry, region) %>%
  summarise(mean_rile = mean(rile, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
mean_rile_region_1 <- country_mean_rile %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(mean_rile_region_1 = round(mean(mean_rile, na.rm = TRUE), 2), .groups = "drop")

mean_unique_per501 <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(per501)) %>%
  group_by(cntry,region) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_unique_per501 = {
      verdier_unike <- unique(per501)
      mean(verdier_unike, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) 
 mean_per501_region_2 <- mean_unique_per501 %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(mean_per501_region_2 = mean(mean_unique_per501, na.rm = TRUE), 2, .groups = "drop")

mean_unique_rile <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(rile)) %>%
  group_by(cntry,region) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_unique_rile = {
      verdier_unike <- unique(rile)
      mean(verdier_unike, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) 
 mean_rile_region_2 <- mean_unique_rile %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(mean_rile_region_2 = mean(mean_unique_rile, na.rm = TRUE), 2, .groups = "drop")

df_green <- df_percentage %>%
  filter(greenvote == 1) %>%
  left_join(mean_per501_region_1, by = "region") %>%
  left_join(mean_rile_region_1, by = "region") %>%
    left_join(mean_per501_region_2, by = "region") %>%
  left_join(mean_rile_region_2, by = "region") 

df_green1 <- df_green %>%
  select(region, percent, count, total) 

kable(df_green1, digits = 1,
      caption = "Green party vote share and ideological orientation of parties by region",
      col.names = c("Region", 
              "Percentage Green Votes", 
              "Count Green Votes", 
              "Observations"),
      format = "latex",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), 
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center", font_size = 10)


df_green2 <- df_green %>%
  select(region, mean_per501_region_1, mean_rile_region_1, mean_per501_region_2, mean_rile_region_2) 

kable(df_green2, digits = 1,
      caption = "Green party vote share and ideological orientation of parties by region",
      col.names = c("Region", 
              "Mean PER501 Green Party", 
              "Mean Left-Right Green Party", 
              "Mean PER501 All Parties", 
              "Mean Left-Right All Parties"),
      format = "latex",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), 
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center", font_size = 10)

```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

ess_years <- setNames(seq(2002, 2022, by = 2), 1:11)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(cntry = as.character(cntry))

countries1 <- c("AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", 
                   "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE", "IT", "LV", "LT", "LU",  
                   "NL", "NO", "PL", "PT", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE", 
                   "CH", "UA", "GB")

all_countries <- c("AL", "AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "DK", "EE", "FI", "FR", 
                   "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE", "IT", "LV", "LT", "LU",  
                   "NL", "NO", "PL", "PT", "RO", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE", 
                   "CH", "UA", "GB")

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = all_countries,
  country = c("Albania", "Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyprus", 
              "Czech Republic", "Denmark", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", 
              "Greece", "Hungary", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Italy", "Latvia", 
              "Lithuania", "Luxembourg", "Netherlands", 
              "Norway", "Poland", "Portugal", "Romania", "Serbia", "Slovakia", "Slovenia", 
              "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "Ukraine", "United Kingdom")
)

region_mapping <- tibble(
  country = country_mapping$country,
  region = case_when(
    country %in% c("Denmark",  "Finland", "Iceland", "Norway", "Sweden") ~ "Northern Europe",
    country %in% c("Austria", "Belgium", "France", "Germany", "Ireland", "Luxembourg", 
                   "Netherlands", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom") ~ "Western Europe",
    country %in% c("Cyprus", "Greece", "Italy", "Portugal", "Spain") ~ "Southern Europe",
    country %in% c("Albania", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Hungary", 
                   "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Montenegro", "Poland", "Romania", "Serbia", "Slovakia", 
                   "Slovenia", "Ukraine") ~ "Eastern Europe"
  )
)


fun_m <- function(x, use_cluster = TRUE) {
  formula_str <- "per501 ~ gndr"
  if (use_cluster) formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ factor(essround)")
  
  m <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), weights = pspwght, data = x)
  coeftest_m <- if (use_cluster) coeftest(m, vcov = vcovCL(m, cluster = ~essround)) 
                else coeftest(m, vcov = vcovHC(m, type = "HC1"))
  
  tibble(
    estimate = coeftest_m["gndr", 1],
    std_error = coeftest_m["gndr", 2],
    p_value = coeftest_m["gndr", 4]
  )
}

results_df <- map_dfr(all_countries, function(i) {
  df_i <- df %>% filter(cntry == i)
  use_cluster <- i %in% countries1
  stats <- fun_m(df_i, use_cluster)
  
  tibble(
    cntry = i,
    formatted_output = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)%s", 
                               stats$estimate, 
                               stats$std_error, 
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.01, "∗∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.05, "∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.1, "∗", ""))))
  )
})

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(country_mapping, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(region_mapping, by = "country")

mean_per501_country <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(per501)) %>%
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_unique_per501 = {
      verdier_unike <- unique(per501)
      mean(verdier_unike, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(mean_per501_country = round(mean_unique_per501, 2))

obs_counts <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(per501)) %>%
  count(cntry, name = "num_obs")

ess_years_df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(per501)) %>%
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(ess_years = paste(sort(unique(ess_years[as.character(essround)])), collapse = ", "),
            .groups = "drop") 

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(obs_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(ess_years_df, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(mean_per501_country, by = "cntry") %>%  
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe", "Eastern Europe"))) %>%
  arrange(region, country)

kable(results_df[, c("country", "formatted_output", "mean_per501_country", "num_obs", "ess_years")], 
      caption = "The effect of gender on environmental protection (per501)",
      col.names = c("Country", "Coefficient Gender (women)", "Mean PER501 (country)", "Observations", "ESS Years"),
      row.names = FALSE,
      output = "latex", 
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), full_width = FALSE, position = "center", font_size = 8) %>%
  group_rows("Northern Europe", 1, sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe")) %>%
  group_rows("Western Europe", sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe") + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Southern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe")) + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Eastern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe")) + 1, 
             nrow(results_df)) %>%
  footnote(general = "Robust SE clustered by ESS round or HC1 in parentheses. *p<0.1; **p<0.05; ***p<0.01.")
```
\newpage
\end{landscape}

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

ess_years <- setNames(seq(2002, 2022, by = 2), 1:11)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(cntry = as.character(cntry))

countries1 <- c("AT", "BE", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE",
                   "IT", "LT", "NL",  "NO", "PL", "PT", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE",
                   "CH", "GB")

all_countries <- c("AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE",
                   "IT", "LV", "LT", "ME", "NL", "MK", "NO", "PL", "PT", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE",
                   "CH", "GB")

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = all_countries, 
  country = c("Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyprus", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", "Greece", "Hungary", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Italy", "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Montenegro", "Netherlands", "North Macedonia", "Norway", "Poland", "Portugal", "Serbia", "Slovakia", "Slovenia", "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom")
)

region_mapping <- tibble(
  country = country_mapping$country,
  region = case_when(
    country %in% c("Finland", "Iceland", "Norway", "Sweden") ~ "Northern Europe",
    country %in% c("Austria", "Belgium", "France", "Germany", "Ireland", 
                   "Netherlands", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom") ~ "Western Europe",
    country %in% c("Cyprus", "Greece", "Italy", "Portugal", "Spain") ~ "Southern Europe",
    country %in% c("Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Hungary", 
                   "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Montenegro", "North Macedonia", "Poland", "Serbia",
                   "Slovakia", "Slovenia") ~ "Eastern Europe"
  )
)

fun_m <- function(x, use_cluster = TRUE) {
  formula_str <- "wrclmch ~ gndr"
  if (use_cluster) formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ factor(essround)")
  
  m <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), weights = pspwght, data = x)
  coeftest_m <- if (use_cluster) coeftest(m, vcov = vcovCL(m, cluster = ~essround)) 
                else coeftest(m, vcov = vcovHC(m, type = "HC1"))
  
  tibble(
    estimate = coeftest_m["gndr", 1],
    std_error = coeftest_m["gndr", 2],
    p_value = coeftest_m["gndr", 4]
  )
}

results_df <- map_dfr(all_countries, function(i) {
  df_i <- df %>% filter(cntry == i)
  use_cluster <- i %in% countries1
  stats <- fun_m(df_i, use_cluster)
  
  tibble(
    cntry = i,
    formatted_output = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)%s", 
                               stats$estimate, 
                               stats$std_error, 
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.01, "∗∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.05, "∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.1, "∗", ""))))
  )
})

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(country_mapping, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(region_mapping, by = "country")

obs_counts <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(wrclmch)) %>%
  count(cntry, name = "num_obs")

ess_years_df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(wrclmch)) %>%
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(ess_years = paste(sort(unique(ess_years[as.character(essround)])), collapse = ", ")) %>%
  ungroup()

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(obs_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(ess_years_df, by = "cntry") %>%
  replace_na(list(num_obs = 0, ess_years = "None"))  

results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe", "Eastern Europe"))) %>%
  arrange(region, country)

kable(results_df[, c("country", "formatted_output", "num_obs", "ess_years")], 
      caption = "The effect of gender on climate change concern per country",
      col.names = c("Country", "Coefficient Gender (women)", "Observations", "ESS Years"),
      row.names = FALSE,
      output = "latex", 
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), full_width = F, position = "center", font_size = 10) %>%
  
  group_rows("Northern Europe", 1, sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe")) %>%
  group_rows("Western Europe", sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe") + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Southern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe")) + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Eastern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe")) + 1, 
             nrow(results_df)) %>%
  footnote(general = c("Robust standard errors clustered by ESS round or HC1 in parentheses.",
                        "∗p<0.1; ∗∗p<0.05; ∗∗∗p<0.01."))
```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

ess_years <- setNames(seq(2002, 2022, by = 2), 1:11)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(cntry = as.character(cntry))

countries1 <- c("AT", "BE", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE",
                   "IT", "LT", "NL",  "NO", "PL", "PT", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE",
                   "CH", "GB")

all_countries <- c("AT", "BE", "BG", "HR", "CY", "CZ", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", "GR", "HU", "IS", "IE",
                   "IT", "LV", "LT", "ME", "NL", "MK", "NO", "PL", "PT", "RS", "SK", "SI", "ES", "SE",
                   "CH", "GB")

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = all_countries, 
  country = c("Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyprus", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", "Greece", "Hungary", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Italy", "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Montenegro", "Netherlands", "North Macedonia", "Norway", "Poland", "Portugal", "Serbia", "Slovakia", "Slovenia", "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom")
)

region_mapping <- tibble(
  country = country_mapping$country,
  region = case_when(
    country %in% c("Finland", "Iceland", "Norway", "Sweden") ~ "Northern Europe",
    country %in% c("Austria", "Belgium", "France", "Germany", "Ireland", 
                   "Netherlands", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom") ~ "Western Europe",
    country %in% c("Cyprus", "Greece", "Italy", "Portugal", "Spain") ~ "Southern Europe",
    country %in% c("Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Hungary", 
                   "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Montenegro", "North Macedonia", "Poland", "Serbia",
                   "Slovakia", "Slovenia") ~ "Eastern Europe"
  )
)

fun_m <- function(x, use_cluster = TRUE) {
  formula_str <- "ccrdprs ~ gndr"
  if (use_cluster) formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ factor(essround)")
  
  m <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), weights = pspwght, data = x)
  coeftest_m <- if (use_cluster) coeftest(m, vcov = vcovCL(m, cluster = ~essround)) 
                else coeftest(m, vcov = vcovHC(m, type = "HC1"))
  
  tibble(
    estimate = coeftest_m["gndr", 1],
    std_error = coeftest_m["gndr", 2],
    p_value = coeftest_m["gndr", 4]
  )
}

results_df <- map_dfr(all_countries, function(i) {
  df_i <- df %>% filter(cntry == i)
  use_cluster <- i %in% countries1
  stats <- fun_m(df_i, use_cluster)
  
  tibble(
    cntry = i,
    formatted_output = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)%s", 
                               stats$estimate, 
                               stats$std_error, 
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.01, "∗∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.05, "∗∗",
                               ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.1, "∗", ""))))
  )
})

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(country_mapping, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(region_mapping, by = "country")

obs_counts <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(ccrdprs)) %>%
  count(cntry, name = "num_obs")

ess_years_df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(ccrdprs)) %>%
  group_by(cntry) %>%
  summarise(ess_years = paste(sort(unique(ess_years[as.character(essround)])), collapse = ", ")) %>%
  ungroup()

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(obs_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(ess_years_df, by = "cntry") %>%
  replace_na(list(num_obs = 0, ess_years = "None"))  

results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe", "Eastern Europe"))) %>%
  arrange(region, country)

kable(results_df[, c("country", "formatted_output", "num_obs", "ess_years")], 
      caption = "The effect of gender on feeling of personal responsibility per country",
      col.names = c("Country", "Coefficient Gender (women)", "Observations", "ESS Years"),
      row.names = FALSE,
      output = "latex", 
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), full_width = F, position = "center", font_size = 10) %>%
  
  group_rows("Northern Europe", 1, sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe")) %>%
  group_rows("Western Europe", sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe") + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Southern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe")) + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Eastern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe")) + 1, 
             nrow(results_df)) %>%
  footnote(general = c("Robust standard errors clustered by ESS round or HC1 in parentheses.",
                        "∗p<0.1; ∗∗p<0.05; ∗∗∗p<0.01."))

```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

ess_years <- setNames(seq(2002, 2022, by = 2), 1:11)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(cntry = as.character(cntry))


all_countries <- c("AT", "BE", "CZ", "EE", "FI", "FR", "DE", "HU", "IS", "IE",
                   "IT", "LT",  "NL", "NO", "PL", "PT", "SI", "ES", "SE",
                   "CH", "GB")

country_mapping <- tibble(
  cntry = all_countries, 
  country = c("Austria", "Belgium", "Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", "Hungary", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Italy", "Lithuania", "Netherlands", "Norway", "Poland", "Portugal", "Slovenia", "Spain", "Sweden", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom")
)

region_mapping <- tibble(
  country = country_mapping$country,
  region = case_when(
    country %in% c("Finland", "Iceland", "Norway", "Sweden") ~ "Northern Europe",
    country %in% c("Austria", "Belgium", "France", "Germany", "Ireland", 
                   "Netherlands", "Switzerland", "United Kingdom") ~ "Western Europe",
    country %in% c("Italy", "Portugal", "Spain") ~ "Southern Europe",
    country %in% c("Czech Republic", "Estonia", "Hungary", 
                   "Lithuania", "Poland", "Slovenia") ~ "Eastern Europe"
  )
)

fun_m <- function(x) {
  if (nrow(x) == 0) {
    return(tibble(estimate = NA, std_error = NA, p_value = NA))
  }
  
  m <- lm(polindex ~ gndr, weights = pspwght, data = x)
  
  coeftest_m <- tryCatch(
    coeftest(m, vcov = vcovHC(m, type = "HC1")),
    error = function(e) return(NULL)
  )
  
  if (is.null(coeftest_m)) {
    return(tibble(estimate = NA, std_error = NA, p_value = NA))
  }
  
  tibble(
    estimate = coeftest_m["gndr", 1],
    std_error = coeftest_m["gndr", 2],
    p_value = coeftest_m["gndr", 4]
  )
}

results_df <- map_dfr(all_countries, function(i) {
  df_i <- df %>% filter(cntry == i)
  stats <- fun_m(df_i)
  
  tibble(
    cntry = i,
    formatted_output = if (!is.na(stats$estimate)) sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)%s", 
                                                           stats$estimate, 
                                                           stats$std_error, 
                                                           ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.01, "∗∗∗",
                                                           ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.05, "∗∗",
                                                           ifelse(stats$p_value < 0.1, "∗", ""))))
    else "NA"
  )
})

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(country_mapping, by = "cntry") %>%
  left_join(region_mapping, by = "country")

obs_counts <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(polindex)) %>%
  count(cntry, name = "num_obs")

results_df <- results_df %>%
  left_join(obs_counts, by = "cntry") %>%
  replace_na(list(num_obs = 0))

results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe", "Eastern Europe"))) %>%
  arrange(region, country)

kable(results_df[, c("country", "formatted_output", "num_obs")], 
      caption = "The effect of gender on climate index",
      col.names = c("Country", "Coefficient Gender (women)", "Observations"),
      row.names = FALSE,
      output = "latex", 
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"), full_width = F, position = "center", font_size = 10) %>%
  
  group_rows("Northern Europe", 1, sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe")) %>%
  group_rows("Western Europe", sum(results_df$region == "Northern Europe") + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Southern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe")) + 1, 
             sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe"))) %>%
  group_rows("Eastern Europe", sum(results_df$region %in% c("Northern Europe", "Western Europe", "Southern Europe")) + 1, 
             nrow(results_df)) %>%
  footnote(general = c("Robust standard errors (HC1) in parentheses.",
                        "∗p<0.1; ∗∗p<0.05; ∗∗∗p<0.01."))
```
\newpage
\begin{landscape}

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

fun_m <- function(x) {
  
  m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m2 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m3 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m4 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m5 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, family = binomial, data = x)
  m6 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)

  return(list(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6))
}
fun_se <- function(x) {
  
  m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m2 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m3 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m4 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m5 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, family = binomial, data = x)
  m6 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = x)

  m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  m6_se <- coeftest(m6, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
  m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
  m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
  m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
  m5_se <- m5_se[,2]
  m6_se <- m6_se[,2]

  return(list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se, m5_se, m6_se))
}

# West 
df_w <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "AT" | cntry == "BE" | cntry == "DE" | cntry == "CH" | cntry == "LU" | cntry == "FR" | cntry == "GB" | cntry == "NL" | cntry == "IE") 
list_m <- fun_m(df_w)
list_se <- fun_se(df_w)

stargazer(list_m, 
          se = list_se,
          title = "Western Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "essround"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Action", "Climate Index", "Green Vote", "Environmental Protection", "Anti-Growth Economy"),
          covariate.labels = c("Gender(Women)"),
          font.size = "tiny",
          header = FALSE,
          notes.align = "l",
          notes = c("Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)
```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
## Eastern
df_e <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "CZ" | cntry == "EE" | cntry == "HU" | cntry == "AL" | cntry == "BG" | cntry == "HR" | cntry == "XK" | cntry == "LV" | cntry == "LT" | cntry == "PL" | cntry == "SI" | cntry == "ME" | cntry == "MK" | cntry == "RO" | cntry == "RS" | cntry == "SK" | cntry == "UA")
list_m <- fun_m(df_e)
list_se <- fun_se(df_e)

stargazer(list_m,
          se = list_se,
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          title = "Eastern Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "essround"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Action", "Climate Index", "Green Vote", "Environmental Protection", "Anti-Growth Economy"),
          covariate.labels = c("Gender(Women)"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "l",
          notes = c("Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)
```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
## South
df_s <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "ES" | cntry == "IT" | cntry == "PT" | cntry == "CY" | cntry == "GR")
list_m <- fun_m(df_s)
list_se <- fun_se(df_s)

stargazer(list_m,
          se = list_se,
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          title = "Southern Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "essround"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Action", "Climate Index", "Green Vote", "Environmental Protection", "Anti-Growth Economy"),
          covariate.labels = c("Gender(Women)"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "l",
          notes = c("Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)
```
\newpage

```{r results='asis'}
## North
df_n <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "FI" | cntry == "IS" | cntry == "DK" | cntry == "NO" | cntry == "SE")
list_m <- fun_m(df_n)
list_se <- fun_se(df_n)

stargazer(list_m,
          se = list_se,
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          title = "Northern Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "essround"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Action", "Climate Index", "Green Vote", "Environmental Protection", "Anti-Growth Economy"),
          covariate.labels = (c("Gender(Women)")),
          font.size = "tiny",
          header = FALSE,
          notes.align = "l",
          notes = c("Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)
```
\newpage
\end{landscape}

```{r results='asis'}
rm(list = ls())
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

model_gender <- function(data) {
  lm(per501 ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = data)
}
model_gender_rile <- function(data) {
  lm(per501 ~ gndr + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = data)
}

get_se <- function(model) {
  coeftest(model, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)[, 2]
}

regions <- list(
  West = c("AT", "BE", "DE", "CH", "LU", "FR", "GB", "NL", "IE"),
  East = c("CZ", "EE", "HU", "AL", "BG", "HR", "XK", "LV", "LT", "PL", "SI", "ME", "MK", "RO", "RS", "SK", "UA"),
  South = c("ES", "IT", "PT", "CY", "GR"),
  North = c("FI", "IS", "DK", "NO", "SE")
)

for (region_name in names(regions)) {
  df_region_full <- df %>% filter(cntry %in% regions[[region_name]])
  df_region_filtered <- df_region_full %>% filter(is.na(greenvote) | greenvote != 1)
  models <- list(
    model_gender(df_region_full),
    model_gender_rile(df_region_full),
    model_gender(df_region_filtered),
    model_gender_rile(df_region_filtered)
  )

  ses <- lapply(models, get_se)
  stargazer(models,
            se = ses,
            title = paste("Effect of gender on Environmental protection in", region_name, "Europe"),
            column.labels = c("", "", "No Greens Partis", "No Greens Partis"),
            dep.var.caption = "",  
            keep.stat = c("n","adj.rsq"),
            dep.var.labels.include = FALSE, 
            covariate.labels = c("Gender (Women)", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)"),
            keep = c("gndr", "rile", "per503", "per604"),
            type = "latex",
            header = FALSE,
            font.size = "tiny",
            notes.align = "l",
            notes = "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses")
}
```

\newpage
\begin{landscape}

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, domicil, class16, ipadvnt, lrscale)

fun_m <- function(x) {
  m1 <- lm(inctxff ~ gndr + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m2 <- lm(sbsrnen ~ gndr + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = x)
  m3 <- lm(banhhap ~ gndr + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = x)
  return(list(m1, m2, m3))
}

extract_gender_coef <- function(model, region, outcome) {
  test <- coeftest(model, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)["gndr", ]
  coef <- test[1]
  se <- test[2]
  pval <- test[4]
  
  stars <- if (pval < 0.01) {
    "***"
  } else if (pval < 0.05) {
    "**"
  } else if (pval < 0.1) {
    "*"
  } else {
    ""
  }
  
  formatted <- sprintf("%.2f%s (%.2f)", coef, stars, se)
  
  tibble(
    Region = region,
    Outcome = outcome,
    Coef_SE = formatted
  )
}

df_w <- df %>% filter(cntry %in% c("AT", "BE", "DE", "CH", "LU", "FR", "GB", "NL", "IE"))
df_e <- df %>% filter(cntry %in% c("CZ", "EE", "HU", "AL", "BG", "HR", "XK", "LV", "LT", "PL", "SI", "ME", "MK", "RO", "RS", "SK", "UA"))
df_s <- df %>% filter(cntry %in% c("ES", "IT", "PT", "CY", "GR"))
df_n <- df %>% filter(cntry %in% c("FI", "IS", "DK", "NO", "SE"))

results <- list()

# Western
models_w <- fun_m(df_w)
results <- append(results, list(
  extract_gender_coef(models_w[[1]], "Western", "Fossil Taxes"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_w[[2]], "Western", "Renewables Subsidy"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_w[[3]], "Western", "Ban Inefficient")
))

# Eastern
models_e <- fun_m(df_e)
results <- append(results, list(
  extract_gender_coef(models_e[[1]], "Eastern", "Fossil Taxes"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_e[[2]], "Eastern", "Renewables Subsidy"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_e[[3]], "Eastern", "Ban Inefficient")
))

# Southern
models_s <- fun_m(df_s)
results <- append(results, list(
  extract_gender_coef(models_s[[1]], "Southern", "Fossil Taxes"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_s[[2]], "Southern", "Renewables Subsidy"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_s[[3]], "Southern", "Ban Inefficient")
))

# Northern
models_n <- fun_m(df_n)
results <- append(results, list(
  extract_gender_coef(models_n[[1]], "Northern", "Fossil Taxes"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_n[[2]], "Northern", "Renewables Subsidy"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_n[[3]], "Northern", "Ban Inefficient")
))

# All Europe
models_all <- fun_m(df)
results <- append(results, list(
  extract_gender_coef(models_all[[1]], "All Europe", "Fossil Taxes"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_all[[2]], "All Europe", "Renewables Subsidy"),
  extract_gender_coef(models_all[[3]], "All Europe", "Ban Inefficient")
))

final_table <- bind_rows(results) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Outcome, values_from = Coef_SE)

kable(final_table, 
      caption = "Gender coefficients climate policy question in round 8 of ESS", 
      booktabs = TRUE,
      col.names = c("Region", 
                    "Increase Taxes on Fossil Fuels", 
                    "Subsidise Renewable Energy", 
                    "Ban sale of Least Energy Efficient Appliances")) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  footnote(general = "Robust standard errors in parentheses. ∗p<0.1; ∗∗p<0.05; ∗∗∗p<0.01.",
           general_title = "")

```
\newpage
\end{landscape}

# Full Models 

```{r results='asis'}
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, domicil, class16, ipadvnt, lrscale)

m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m4 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m5 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + lrscale  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
m5_se <- m5_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, 
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se, m5_se),
          title = "Important to preserve nature and the environment",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = (c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5")),
          covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)

# Climate Worry
m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m4 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m5 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + lrscale  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
m5_se <- m5_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5,
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se, m5_se),
          title = "Climate change concern",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = (c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5")),
          covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)

# Personal Action
m1 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m4 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m5 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + lrscale  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
m5_se <- m5_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, 
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se, m5_se),
          title = "Personal responsibility",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = (c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5")),
          covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)

# Climate index 
m1 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr + agea + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
m4 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
m5 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + lrscale  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
m5_se <- m5_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3, m4, 
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se),
          title = "Climate index",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = (c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5")),
          covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)
```

```{r results='asis'}
## Green vote glm
m1 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = anweight, data = df)
m4 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale  + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = anweight, data = df)
m5 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = anweight, data = df)
m6 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + lrscale + rile + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = anweight, data = df)
m7 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + lrscale + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), binomial(link = "logit"), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m6_se <- coeftest(m6, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m7_se <- coeftest(m7, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
m5_se <- m5_se[,2]
m6_se <- m6_se[,2]
m7_se <- m7_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6, m7, 
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se, m5_se, m6_se, m7_se),
          title = "Voting for a Green Party",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale", "rile", "per503", "per604", "impenv", "wrclmch", "ccrdprs"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5", "Model 6", "Model 7"),
covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Position", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          column.sep.width = "1pt",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m4 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m5 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m6 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m7 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m6_se <- coeftest(m6, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m7_se <- coeftest(m7, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
m5_se <- m5_se[,2]
m6_se <- m6_se[,2]
m7_se <- m7_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6, m7, 
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se, m5_se, m6_se, m7_se),
          title = "Environmental protection (per501)",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale", "rile", "per503", "per604", "impenv", "wrclmch", "ccrdprs"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5", "Model 6", "Model 7"),
covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)

```

```{r results='asis'}
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, domicil, class16, ipadvnt, lrscale) %>%
  filter(is.na(greenvote) | greenvote != 1)

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m4 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m5 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m6 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m7 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m4_se <- coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m5_se <- coeftest(m5, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m6_se <- coeftest(m6, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m7_se <- coeftest(m7, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]
m4_se <- m4_se[,2]
m5_se <- m5_se[,2]
m6_se <- m6_se[,2]
m7_se <- m7_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6, m7, 
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se, m4_se, m5_se, m6_se, m7_se),
          title = "Environmental protection (per501) no green parties",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale", "rile", "per503", "per604", "impenv", "wrclmch", "ccrdprs"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5", "Model 6", "Model 7"),
covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)

```

\FloatBarrier

\newpage
\begin{landscape} 

% Western Europe
```{r}
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "West")

p_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ "",
    p < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE     ~ ""
  )
}

ceil2 <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA_real_)
  y <- ceiling(x * 100) / 100
  if (y == 0) y <- 0.01
  y
}

fmt_cell <- function(est, se, p) {
  if (is.na(est) || is.na(se)) return("")
  est_f <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(est))
  se_f  <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(se))
  paste0(est_f, p_stars(p), " (", se_f, ")")
}

f_m1_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_index <- polindex ~ gndr + factor(cntry)
f_m2_index <- polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry)

f_m1_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

models <- list(
  "Environmentalism" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_env, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_env, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Worry" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_worry, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_worry, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Personal Responsibility" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_pr, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_pr, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Index" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_index, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_index, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Green Vote" = list(
    M1 = glm(f_m1_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = glm(f_m2_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df)
  )
)

extract_clustered <- function(model, outcome, model_name) {
  ct <- lmtest::coeftest(model, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  tibble::tibble(
    term     = rownames(ct),
    estimate = ct[, 1],
    se       = ct[, 2],
    p        = ct[, 4],
    outcome  = outcome,
    model    = model_name
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(value = purrr::pmap_chr(list(estimate, se, p), fmt_cell)) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value)
}

results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models), function(outcome) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models[[outcome]]), function(mname) {
    extract_clustered(models[[outcome]][[mname]], outcome, mname)
  }))
}))

keep_terms <- c(
  "gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "ipadvnt", "lrscale",
  grep("^factor\\(class16\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE),
  grep("^factor\\(domicil\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE)
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::filter(term %in% keep_terms)

var_labels <- c(
  gndr    = "Women",
  agea    = "Age",
  eisced2 = "Higher Education",
  ipadvnt = "Risk Aversion",
  lrscale = "Left–Right Position"
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = dplyr::recode(term, !!!var_labels)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = stringr::str_replace_all(term, c(
    "factor\\(class16\\)" = "Class: ",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)2" = "Locality: Suburbs Or Outskirts Of Big City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)3" = "Locality: Town Or Small City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)4" = "Locality: Country Village",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)5" = "Locality: Farm Or Home In Countryside"
  )))

final_table <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(model = ifelse(model == "M1", "Model 1", "Model 2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(outcome, model),
    values_from = value,
    values_fill = ""
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Variable = term)

outcomes <- c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Responsibility", "Climate Index", "Green Vote")

final_table <- final_table[, c(
  "Variable",
  unlist(lapply(outcomes, function(o) c(paste0(o, "_Model 1"), paste0(o, "_Model 2"))))
)]

get_N <- function(mod) stats::nobs(mod)

n_row <- tibble::tibble(Variable = "Observations")
for (o in outcomes) {
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 1")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M1))
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 2")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M2))
}

final_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(final_table, n_row)

colnames(final_table) <- c(
  "",
  rep(c("Model 1", "Model 2"), times = length(outcomes))
)

header_spanner <- c(" " = 1)
for (o in outcomes) header_spanner[o] <- 2

lr_row <- which(final_table[[1]] == "Left–Right Position")
if (length(lr_row) != 1) lr_row <- nrow(final_table) - 1

kableExtra::kable(
  final_table,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align    = c("l", rep("c", ncol(final_table) - 1)),
  escape   = FALSE,
  caption  = "The effect of gender on climate and environmental attitudes in Western Europe"
) %>%
  kableExtra::add_header_above(header_spanner) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down", "repeat_header"),
    font_size = 11
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    1:(nrow(final_table) - 1),
    extra_latex_after = "\\addlinespace[2pt]"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    lr_row,
    extra_latex_after = "\\midrule"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::footnote(
    general = c(
      "Occupation reference category low-skilled manual. Locality reference category a big city. Fixed effects on country and ESS round. Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses.",
      "Significance: *** p<0.01, ** p<0.05, * p<0.10."
    ),
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )

```

% Central/Eastern Europe
```{r}
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "Central/Eastern")

p_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ "",
    p < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE     ~ ""
  )
}

ceil2 <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA_real_)
  y <- ceiling(x * 100) / 100
  if (y == 0) y <- 0.01
  y
}

fmt_cell <- function(est, se, p) {
  if (is.na(est) || is.na(se)) return("")
  est_f <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(est))
  se_f  <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(se))
  paste0(est_f, p_stars(p), " (", se_f, ")")
}

f_m1_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_index <- polindex ~ gndr + factor(cntry)
f_m2_index <- polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry)

f_m1_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

models <- list(
  "Environmentalism" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_env, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_env, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Worry" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_worry, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_worry, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Personal Responsibility" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_pr, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_pr, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Index" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_index, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_index, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Green Vote" = list(
    M1 = glm(f_m1_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = glm(f_m2_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df)
  )
)

extract_clustered <- function(model, outcome, model_name) {
  ct <- lmtest::coeftest(model, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  tibble::tibble(
    term     = rownames(ct),
    estimate = ct[, 1],
    se       = ct[, 2],
    p        = ct[, 4],
    outcome  = outcome,
    model    = model_name
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(value = purrr::pmap_chr(list(estimate, se, p), fmt_cell)) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value)
}

results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models), function(outcome) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models[[outcome]]), function(mname) {
    extract_clustered(models[[outcome]][[mname]], outcome, mname)
  }))
}))

keep_terms <- c(
```
