  "gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "ipadvnt", "lrscale",
  grep("^factor\\(class16\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE),
  grep("^factor\\(domicil\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE)
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::filter(term %in% keep_terms)

var_labels <- c(
  gndr    = "Women",
  agea    = "Age",
  eisced2 = "Higher Education",
  ipadvnt = "Risk Aversion",
  lrscale = "Left–Right Position"
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = dplyr::recode(term, !!!var_labels)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = stringr::str_replace_all(term, c(
    "factor\\(class16\\)" = "Class: ",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)2" = "Locality: Suburbs Or Outskirts Of Big City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)3" = "Locality: Town Or Small City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)4" = "Locality: Country Village",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)5" = "Locality: Farm Or Home In Countryside"
  )))

final_table <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(model = ifelse(model == "M1", "Model 1", "Model 2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(outcome, model),
    values_from = value,
    values_fill = ""
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Variable = term)

outcomes <- c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Responsibility", "Climate Index", "Green Vote")

final_table <- final_table[, c(
  "Variable",
  unlist(lapply(outcomes, function(o) c(paste0(o, "_Model 1"), paste0(o, "_Model 2"))))
)]

get_N <- function(mod) stats::nobs(mod)

n_row <- tibble::tibble(Variable = "Observations")
for (o in outcomes) {
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 1")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M1))
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 2")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M2))
}

final_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(final_table, n_row)

colnames(final_table) <- c(
  "",
  rep(c("Model 1", "Model 2"), times = length(outcomes))
)

header_spanner <- c(" " = 1)
for (o in outcomes) header_spanner[o] <- 2

lr_row <- which(final_table[[1]] == "Left–Right Position")
if (length(lr_row) != 1) lr_row <- nrow(final_table) - 1

kableExtra::kable(
  final_table,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align    = c("l", rep("c", ncol(final_table) - 1)),
  escape   = FALSE,
  caption  = "The effect of gender on climate and environmental attitudes in Central/Eastern Europe"
) %>%
  kableExtra::add_header_above(header_spanner) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down", "repeat_header"),
    font_size = 11
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    1:(nrow(final_table) - 1),
    extra_latex_after = "\\addlinespace[2pt]"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    lr_row,
    extra_latex_after = "\\midrule"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::footnote(
    general = c(
      "Occupation reference category low-skilled manual. Locality reference category a big city. Fixed effects on country and ESS round. Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses.",
      "Significance: *** p<0.01, ** p<0.05, * p<0.10."
    ),
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )

```

% Sothern Europe
```{r}
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "South")

p_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ "",
    p < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE     ~ ""
  )
}

ceil2 <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA_real_)
  y <- ceiling(x * 100) / 100
  if (y == 0) y <- 0.01
  y
}

fmt_cell <- function(est, se, p) {
  if (is.na(est) || is.na(se)) return("")
  est_f <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(est))
  se_f  <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(se))
  paste0(est_f, p_stars(p), " (", se_f, ")")
}

f_m1_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_index <- polindex ~ gndr + factor(cntry)
f_m2_index <- polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry)

f_m1_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

models <- list(
  "Environmentalism" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_env, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_env, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Worry" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_worry, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_worry, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Personal Responsibility" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_pr, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_pr, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Index" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_index, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_index, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Green Vote" = list(
    M1 = glm(f_m1_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = glm(f_m2_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df)
  )
)

extract_clustered <- function(model, outcome, model_name) {
  ct <- lmtest::coeftest(model, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  tibble::tibble(
    term     = rownames(ct),
    estimate = ct[, 1],
    se       = ct[, 2],
    p        = ct[, 4],
    outcome  = outcome,
    model    = model_name
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(value = purrr::pmap_chr(list(estimate, se, p), fmt_cell)) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value)
}

results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models), function(outcome) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models[[outcome]]), function(mname) {
    extract_clustered(models[[outcome]][[mname]], outcome, mname)
  }))
}))

keep_terms <- c(
  "gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "ipadvnt", "lrscale",
  grep("^factor\\(class16\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE),
  grep("^factor\\(domicil\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE)
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::filter(term %in% keep_terms)

var_labels <- c(
  gndr    = "Women",
  agea    = "Age",
  eisced2 = "Higher Education",
  ipadvnt = "Risk Aversion",
  lrscale = "Left–Right Position"
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = dplyr::recode(term, !!!var_labels)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = stringr::str_replace_all(term, c(
    "factor\\(class16\\)" = "Class: ",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)2" = "Locality: Suburbs Or Outskirts Of Big City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)3" = "Locality: Town Or Small City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)4" = "Locality: Country Village",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)5" = "Locality: Farm Or Home In Countryside"
  )))

final_table <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(model = ifelse(model == "M1", "Model 1", "Model 2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(outcome, model),
    values_from = value,
    values_fill = ""
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Variable = term)

outcomes <- c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Responsibility", "Climate Index", "Green Vote")

final_table <- final_table[, c(
  "Variable",
  unlist(lapply(outcomes, function(o) c(paste0(o, "_Model 1"), paste0(o, "_Model 2"))))
)]

get_N <- function(mod) stats::nobs(mod)

n_row <- tibble::tibble(Variable = "Observations")
for (o in outcomes) {
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 1")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M1))
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 2")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M2))
}

final_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(final_table, n_row)

colnames(final_table) <- c(
  "",
  rep(c("Model 1", "Model 2"), times = length(outcomes))
)

header_spanner <- c(" " = 1)
for (o in outcomes) header_spanner[o] <- 2

lr_row <- which(final_table[[1]] == "Left–Right Position")
if (length(lr_row) != 1) lr_row <- nrow(final_table) - 1

kableExtra::kable(
  final_table,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align    = c("l", rep("c", ncol(final_table) - 1)),
  escape   = FALSE,
  caption  = "The effect of gender on climate and environmental attitudes in Southern Europe"
) %>%
  kableExtra::add_header_above(header_spanner) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down", "repeat_header"),
    font_size = 11
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    1:(nrow(final_table) - 1),
    extra_latex_after = "\\addlinespace[2pt]"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    lr_row,
    extra_latex_after = "\\midrule"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::footnote(
    general = c(
      "Occupation reference category low-skilled manual. Locality reference category a big city. Fixed effects on country and ESS round. Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses.",
      "Significance: *** p<0.01, ** p<0.05, * p<0.10."
    ),
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )

```

% Northern Europe
```{r}
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "North")

p_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ "",
    p < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE     ~ ""
  )
}

ceil2 <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return(NA_real_)
  y <- ceiling(x * 100) / 100
  if (y == 0) y <- 0.01
  y
}

fmt_cell <- function(est, se, p) {
  if (is.na(est) || is.na(se)) return("")
  est_f <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(est))
  se_f  <- sprintf("%.2f", ceil2(se))
  paste0(est_f, p_stars(p), " (", se_f, ")")
}

f_m1_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_env   <- impenv  ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_worry <- wrclmch ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_pr    <- ccrdprs ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

f_m1_index <- polindex ~ gndr + factor(cntry)
f_m2_index <- polindex ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry)

f_m1_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)
f_m2_gv <- greenvote ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) +
  ipadvnt + lrscale + factor(cntry) + factor(essround)

models <- list(
  "Environmentalism" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_env, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_env, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Worry" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_worry, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_worry, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Personal Responsibility" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_pr, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_pr, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Climate Index" = list(
    M1 = lm(f_m1_index, weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = lm(f_m2_index, weights = anweight, data = df)
  ),
  "Green Vote" = list(
    M1 = glm(f_m1_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df),
    M2 = glm(f_m2_gv, family = binomial(link = "logit"),
             weights = anweight, data = df)
  )
)

extract_clustered <- function(model, outcome, model_name) {
  ct <- lmtest::coeftest(model, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
  tibble::tibble(
    term     = rownames(ct),
    estimate = ct[, 1],
    se       = ct[, 2],
    p        = ct[, 4],
    outcome  = outcome,
    model    = model_name
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(value = purrr::pmap_chr(list(estimate, se, p), fmt_cell)) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value)
}

results <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models), function(outcome) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(models[[outcome]]), function(mname) {
    extract_clustered(models[[outcome]][[mname]], outcome, mname)
  }))
}))

keep_terms <- c(
  "gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "ipadvnt", "lrscale",
  grep("^factor\\(class16\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE),
  grep("^factor\\(domicil\\)", unique(results$term), value = TRUE)
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::filter(term %in% keep_terms)

var_labels <- c(
  gndr    = "Women",
  agea    = "Age",
  eisced2 = "Higher Education",
  ipadvnt = "Risk Aversion",
  lrscale = "Left–Right Position"
)

results <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = dplyr::recode(term, !!!var_labels)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term = stringr::str_replace_all(term, c(
    "factor\\(class16\\)" = "Class: ",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)2" = "Locality: Suburbs Or Outskirts Of Big City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)3" = "Locality: Town Or Small City",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)4" = "Locality: Country Village",
    "factor\\(domicil\\)5" = "Locality: Farm Or Home In Countryside"
  )))

final_table <- results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(model = ifelse(model == "M1", "Model 1", "Model 2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, outcome, model, value) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(outcome, model),
    values_from = value,
    values_fill = ""
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Variable = term)

outcomes <- c("Environmentalism", "Climate Worry", "Personal Responsibility", "Climate Index", "Green Vote")

final_table <- final_table[, c(
  "Variable",
  unlist(lapply(outcomes, function(o) c(paste0(o, "_Model 1"), paste0(o, "_Model 2"))))
)]

get_N <- function(mod) stats::nobs(mod)

n_row <- tibble::tibble(Variable = "Observations")
for (o in outcomes) {
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 1")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M1))
  n_row[[paste0(o, "_Model 2")]] <- as.character(get_N(models[[o]]$M2))
}

final_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(final_table, n_row)

colnames(final_table) <- c(
  "",
  rep(c("Model 1", "Model 2"), times = length(outcomes))
)

header_spanner <- c(" " = 1)
for (o in outcomes) header_spanner[o] <- 2

lr_row <- which(final_table[[1]] == "Left–Right Position")
if (length(lr_row) != 1) lr_row <- nrow(final_table) - 1

kableExtra::kable(
  final_table,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align    = c("l", rep("c", ncol(final_table) - 1)),
  escape   = FALSE,
  caption  = "The effect of gender on climate and environmental attitudes in Northern Europe"
) %>%
  kableExtra::add_header_above(header_spanner) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down", "repeat_header"),
    font_size = 11
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    1:(nrow(final_table) - 1),
    extra_latex_after = "\\addlinespace[2pt]"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::row_spec(
    lr_row,
    extra_latex_after = "\\midrule"
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::footnote(
    general = c(
      "Occupation reference category low-skilled manual. Locality reference category a big city. Fixed effects on country and ESS round. Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses.",
      "Significance: *** p<0.01, ** p<0.05, * p<0.10."
    ),
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )

```

\newpage
\end{landscape}

```{r results='asis'}
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "West")

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3,  
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se),
          title = "The effect of gender on voting for parties with a pro-environmental manifesto in Western Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale", "rile", "per503", "per604", "impenv", "wrclmch", "ccrdprs"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5", "Model 6", "Model 7"),
covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)


load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "Central/Eastern")

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3,  
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se),
          title = "The effect of gender on voting for parties with a pro-environmental manifesto in Central/Eastern Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale", "rile", "per503", "per604", "impenv", "wrclmch", "ccrdprs"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5", "Model 6", "Model 7"),
covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "South")

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3,  
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se),
          title = "The effect of gender on voting for parties with a pro-environmental manifesto in Southern Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale", "rile", "per503", "per604", "impenv", "wrclmch", "ccrdprs"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5", "Model 6", "Model 7"),
covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)


load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(region == "North")

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m2 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
m3 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr + agea + eisced2 + factor(class16) + factor(domicil) + lrscale + ipadvnt + rile + per503 + per604 + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)

m1_se <- coeftest(m1, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m2_se <- coeftest(m2, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m3_se <- coeftest(m3, vcov = vcovCL, cluster = ~cntry)
m1_se <- m1_se[,2]
m2_se <- m2_se[,2]
m3_se <- m3_se[,2]

stargazer(m1, m2, m3,  
          se = list(m1_se, m2_se, m3_se),
          title = "The effect of gender on voting for parties with a pro-environmental manifesto in Northern Europe",
          keep = c("gndr", "agea", "eisced2", "class16", "domicil", "ipadvnt", "lrscale", "rile", "per503", "per604", "impenv", "wrclmch", "ccrdprs"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "adj.rsq", "ll"),
          dep.var.labels.include = F,
          dep.var.caption = "",
          model.names = TRUE,
          model.numbers = FALSE,
          column.labels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3", "Model 4", "Model 5", "Model 6", "Model 7"),
covariate.labels = c("Women", "Age", "Higher Education", "Large Employers", "Lower-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Skilled Clerks", "Unskilled Clerks", "Socio-Cultural Professionals", "Socio-Cultural Semi-Professionals", "Skilled Service", "Low-Skilled Service", "Self-Employed Professionals", "Small Business Owners With Employees", "Small Business Owners Without Employees", "Technical Experts", "Technicians", "Skilled Manual", "Low-Skilled Manual", "Higher-Grade Managers and Administrators", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside", "Risk Aversion", "Left-Right Party (rile)", "Equality: Positive (per503)", "Traditional Morality: Negative (per604)", "Left-Right Position"),
          type = "latex",
          header = FALSE,
          font.size = "tiny",
          notes.align = "r",
          notes = c("Occupation reference category low-skilled manual.", "Locality reference category a big city.", "Fixed effects on country and ESS round.", "Robust standard errors clustered by country in parentheses."),
          notes.append = TRUE)
```

\FloatBarrier
\newpage 

# Temporal Analysis 

## Environmentalism
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Environmentalism over time.", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

find_mode <- function(x) {
  u <- unique(x)
  tab <- tabulate(match(x, u))
  u[tab == max(tab)]
}

m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr*factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = 1:11, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.5, linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.8, 11.2), breaks = c(1:11), labels = c("2002", "2004", "2006", "2008", "2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Environmentalism over time in countries included in all ESS rounds. Belgium, Finland, France, Hungary, Ireland, Netherlands, Norway,  Portugal, Slovenia, Switzerland, United Kingdom.", fig.width=7, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
df <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "BE" | cntry == "CH" |  cntry == "FI" | cntry == "FR" | cntry == "GB" | cntry == "HU" | cntry == "IE" | cntry == "NL" | cntry == "NO" | cntry == "PT" | cntry == "SI")

m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr*factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = 1:11, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea, na.rm = T),
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.5, linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.8, 11.2), breaks = c(1:11), labels = c("2002", "2004", "2006", "2008", "2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

## Green Party Voting
```{r fig.cap="Voting for a green party over time", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
rm(list = ls())
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

find_mode <- function(x) {
  u <- unique(x)
  tab <- tabulate(match(x, u))
  u[tab == max(tab)]
}

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(greenvote)

m1 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr * factor(essround) + factor(cntry), family = binomial, weights = anweight, data = df)

df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = 1:11, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))

preds <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

df_pred  <- df_pred %>%
  mutate(
    fit = plogis(preds$fit),
    lwr = plogis(preds$fit - 1.96 * preds$se.fit),
    upr = plogis(preds$fit + 1.96 * preds$se.fit),
    essround = as.numeric(as.character(essround))
  )

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.3, linewidth = 0.9) + 
  geom_line() + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.8, 11.2), breaks = c(1:11), labels = c("2002", "2004", "2006", "2008", "2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020", "2022")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Predicted Probability") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")

```

```{r fig.cap="Voting for a green party over time in countries included in all ESS rounds. Belgium, Germany, Finland, Ireland,  Netherlands, Sweden, Switzerland, United Kingdom", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(greenvote)

df <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "BE" | cntry == "CH" | cntry == "DE" | cntry == "FI"  | cntry == "IE" | cntry == "GB" |cntry == "NL" | cntry == "SE")

m1 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr * factor(essround) + factor(cntry), family = binomial, weights = anweight, data = df)

df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = 1:11, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))

preds <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

df_pred  <- df_pred %>%
  mutate(
    fit = plogis(preds$fit),
    lwr = plogis(preds$fit - 1.96 * preds$se.fit),
    upr = plogis(preds$fit + 1.96 * preds$se.fit),
    essround = as.numeric(as.character(essround))
  )

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.3, linewidth = 0.9) + 
  geom_line() + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.8, 11.2), breaks = c(1:11), labels = c("2002", "2004", "2006", "2008", "2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020", "2022")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Predicted Probability") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")


```

## Climate Change Concern 
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Climate change concern over time", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

find_mode <- function(x) {
  u <- unique(x)
  tab <- tabulate(match(x, u))
  u[tab == max(tab)]
}

m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr*factor(essround) + agea + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = c(8,10,11), 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea, na.rm = T),
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.3, linewidth = 0.9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(7.8, 11.2), breaks = c(8, 10, 11), labels = c("2016", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Climate change concern over time in countries in round 8, 10 and 11 of the ESS. Austria, Belgium, Finland, France, Germany, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Lithuania, Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Kingdom.", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
df <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "AT" | cntry == "BE" | cntry == "CH" | cntry == "DE" |  cntry == "ES" | cntry == "FI" | cntry == "FR" | cntry == "GB" | cntry == "HU" | cntry == "IE" | cntry == "IS" | cntry == "IT" | cntry == "LT" | cntry == "NL" | cntry == "NO" | cntry == "PL" | cntry == "PT" | cntry == "SE" | cntry == "SI")

m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr*factor(essround) + agea + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = c(8,10,11), 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea, na.rm = T),
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.3, linewidth = 0.9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(7.8, 11.2), breaks = c(8, 10, 11), labels = c("2016", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")

```

## Personal Responsibility
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Personal responsibility over time", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

find_mode <- function(x) {
  u <- unique(x)
  tab <- tabulate(match(x, u))
  u[tab == max(tab)]
}

m1 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr*factor(essround) + agea + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = c(8,10,11), 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea, na.rm = T),
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.3, linewidth = 0.9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(7.8, 11.2), breaks = c(8, 10, 11), labels = c("2016", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Personal Responsibility over time in countries included in round 8, 10 of and 11 the ESS. Austria, Belgium, Czech Republic, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Lithuania, Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Kingdom.", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
df <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "AT" | cntry == "BE" | cntry == "CH" | cntry == "DE" |  cntry == "ES" | cntry == "FI" | cntry == "FR" | cntry == "GB" | cntry == "HU" | cntry == "IE" | cntry == "IS" | cntry == "IT" | cntry == "LT" | cntry == "NL" | cntry == "NO" | cntry == "PL" | cntry == "PT" | cntry == "SE" | cntry == "SI")

m1 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr*factor(essround) + agea + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = c(8,10,11), 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea, na.rm = T),
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.3, linewidth = 0.9) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(7.8, 11.2), breaks = c(8, 10, 11), labels = c("2016", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")

```

## Environmental Protection (per501)
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Environmental protection (per501) over time.", fig.height=3, fig.width=7, out.width='\\textwidth'}
rm(list = ls())

load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

find_mode <- function(x) {
  u <- unique(x)
  tab <- tabulate(match(x, u))
  u[tab == max(tab)]
}

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr*factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = 1:11, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea, na.rm = T),
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.5, linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.8, 11.2), breaks = c(1:11), labels = c("2002", "2004", "2006", "2008", "2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Environmental protection (per501) over time in countries included in all ESS rounds. Belgium, Finland, France, Germany, Hungary, Ireland, Netherlands, Norway, Polen, Portugal, Slovenia, Sweden, Switzerland, United Kingdom.", fig.width=7, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
df <- df %>%
  filter(cntry == "BE" | cntry == "CH" | cntry == "DE" | cntry == "ES" | cntry == "FI" | cntry == "FR" | cntry == "GB" | cntry == "HU" | cntry == "IE" | cntry == "NL" | cntry == "NO" | cntry == "PL" | cntry == "PT" | cntry == "SE"| cntry == "SI")

m1 <- lm(per501 ~ gndr*factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(essround = 1:11, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea, na.rm = T),
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = essround, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.5, linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.8, 11.2), breaks = c(1:11), labels = c("2002", "2004", "2006", "2008", "2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020", "2022")) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 16) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```
\newpage

# Gender Interaction Analysis
## Environmentalism
```{r fig.cap="Generational cohorts",  fig.width=8, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Generational cohorts
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(yrbrn_cohort, impenv, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr*factor(yrbrn_cohort) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     yrbrn_cohort = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = yrbrn_cohort, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.9, 6.1), breaks = c(1:6), labels = c("- 1997", "1996 - 1981","1981 - 1965","1965 - 1946", "1945 - 1928", "1927 +")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Education", fig.width=6, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Education 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, impenv, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr*factor(eisced2) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     eisced2 = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = eisced2, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 1.1), breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Lower Education", "Higher Education")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Occupation", fig.width=8, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Occupation 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(class8, impenv, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(impenv ~ factor(class8)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(class8 = 1:8, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$class8 <- factor(df_pred$class8, levels = c(1:8), 
                         labels = c("1 Self-Employed Professionals and Large Employers", "2 Small Business Owners", "3 Technical (Semi-)Professionals", "4 Production Workers", "5 (Associate) Managers", "6 Clerks", "7 Socio-Cultural (Semi-)Professionals", "8 Service Workers"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = class8, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Locality", fig.width=7, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Locality 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(domicil, impenv, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(impenv ~ factor(domicil)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(domicil = 1:5, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$domicil <- factor(df_pred$domicil, levels = c(1:5), 
                          labels = c("Big City", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = domicil, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Risk aversion", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Risk taker
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(ipadvnt, impenv, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr*factor(ipadvnt) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     ipadvnt = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = ipadvnt, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1:6)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Left-right position", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# left - right
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(lrscale, impenv, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(impenv ~ gndr*factor(lrscale) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     lrscale = 0:10,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = lrscale, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0:10)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")

```
\newpage

## Climate Change Concern
```{r fig.cap="Generational cohorts",  fig.width=8, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Generational cohorts
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(yrbrn_cohort, wrclmch, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr*factor(yrbrn_cohort) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     yrbrn_cohort = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = yrbrn_cohort, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.9, 6.1), breaks = c(1:6), labels = c("- 1997", "1996 - 1981","1981 - 1965","1965 - 1946", "1945 - 1928", "1927 +")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Education", fig.width=6, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Education 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, wrclmch, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr*factor(eisced2) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     eisced2 = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = eisced2, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 1.1), breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Lower Education", "Higher Education")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Occupation", fig.width=8, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Occupation 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(class8, wrclmch, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(wrclmch ~ factor(class8)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(class8 = 1:8, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$class8 <- factor(df_pred$class8, levels = c(1:8), 
                         labels = c("1 Self-Employed Professionals and Large Employers", "2 Small Business Owners", "3 Technical (Semi-)Professionals", "4 Production Workers", "5 (Associate) Managers", "6 Clerks", "7 Socio-Cultural (Semi-)Professionals", "8 Service Workers"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = class8, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Locality", fig.width=7, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Locality 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(domicil, wrclmch, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(wrclmch ~ factor(domicil)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(domicil = 1:5, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$domicil <- factor(df_pred$domicil, levels = c(1:5), 
                          labels = c("Big City", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = domicil, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Risk aversion", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Risk taker
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(ipadvnt, wrclmch, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr*factor(ipadvnt) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     ipadvnt = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = ipadvnt, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1:6)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Left-right position", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# left - right
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(lrscale, wrclmch, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr*factor(lrscale) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     lrscale = 0:10,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = lrscale, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0:10)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")

```
\newpage

## Personal Responsibility
```{r fig.cap="Generational cohorts",  fig.width=8, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Generational cohorts
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(yrbrn_cohort, ccrdprs, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr*factor(yrbrn_cohort) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     yrbrn_cohort = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = yrbrn_cohort, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.9, 6.1), breaks = c(1:6), labels = c("- 1997", "1996 - 1981","1981 - 1965","1965 - 1946", "1945 - 1928", "1927 +")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Education", fig.width=6, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Education 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, ccrdprs, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr*factor(eisced2) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     eisced2 = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = eisced2, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 1.1), breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Lower Education", "Higher Education")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Occupation", fig.width=8, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Occupation 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(class8, ccrdprs, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ factor(class8)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(class8 = 1:8, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$class8 <- factor(df_pred$class8, levels = c(1:8), 
                         labels = c("1 Self-Employed Professionals and Large Employers", "2 Small Business Owners", "3 Technical (Semi-)Professionals", "4 Production Workers", "5 (Associate) Managers", "6 Clerks", "7 Socio-Cultural (Semi-)Professionals", "8 Service Workers"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = class8, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Locality", fig.width=7, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Locality 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(domicil, ccrdprs, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ factor(domicil)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(domicil = 1:5, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$domicil <- factor(df_pred$domicil, levels = c(1:5), 
                          labels = c("Big City", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = domicil, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Risk aversion", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Risk taker
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(ipadvnt, ccrdprs, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr*factor(ipadvnt) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     ipadvnt = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = ipadvnt, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1:6)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Left-right position", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# left - right
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(lrscale, ccrdprs, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(ccrdprs ~ gndr*factor(lrscale) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     lrscale = 0:10,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = lrscale, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0:10)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")

```
\newpage

## Climate Index
```{r fig.cap="Generational cohorts",  fig.width=8, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Generational cohorts
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(yrbrn_cohort, polindex, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr*factor(yrbrn_cohort)  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     yrbrn_cohort = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = yrbrn_cohort, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.9, 6.1), breaks = c(1:6), labels = c("- 1997", "1996 - 1981","1981 - 1965","1965 - 1946", "1945 - 1928", "1927 +")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Education", fig.width=6, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Education 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, polindex, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr*factor(eisced2)  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     eisced2 = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = eisced2, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 1.1), breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Lower Education", "Higher Education")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Occupation", fig.width=8, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Occupation 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(class8, polindex, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(polindex ~ factor(class8)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) , weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(class8 = 1:8, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$class8 <- factor(df_pred$class8, levels = c(1:8), 
                         labels = c("1 Self-Employed Professionals and Large Employers", "2 Small Business Owners", "3 Technical (Semi-)Professionals", "4 Production Workers", "5 (Associate) Managers", "6 Clerks", "7 Socio-Cultural (Semi-)Professionals", "8 Service Workers"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = class8, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Locality", fig.width=7, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Locality 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))

df <- df %>%
  drop_na(domicil, polindex, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m2 <- lm(polindex ~ factor(domicil)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) , weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(domicil = 1:5, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m2, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)
df_pred$domicil <- factor(df_pred$domicil, levels = c(1:5), 
                          labels = c("Big City", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = domicil, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Risk aversion", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Risk taker
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))


df <- df %>%
  drop_na(ipadvnt, polindex, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(polindex ~ gndr*factor(ipadvnt)  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     ipadvnt = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = ipadvnt, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1:6)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Left-right position", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# left - right
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(lrscale, wrclmch, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- lm(wrclmch ~ gndr*factor(lrscale)  + factor(cntry), weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     lrscale = 0:10,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))
df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = 'response', interval = "confidence")
df_pred <- cbind(df_pred, df_pred2)

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = lrscale, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr, fill = factor(gndr), color = NULL), alpha = .20) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0:10)) +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")

```
\newpage

## Voting for a Green Party
```{r fig.cap="Generational cohorts",  fig.width=8, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Generational cohorts
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(yrbrn_cohort, greenvote, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr*factor(yrbrn_cohort) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), family = binomial, weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     yrbrn_cohort = 1:6,
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))

df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
df_pred$fit <- df_pred2$fit
df_pred$lwr <- df_pred2$fit - 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred$upr <- df_pred2$fit + 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred <- df_pred %>%
  mutate(fit = plogis(fit),
         lwr = plogis(lwr),
         upr = plogis(upr))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = yrbrn_cohort, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.9, 6.1), breaks = c(1:6), labels = c("- 1997", "1996 - 1981","1981 - 1965","1965 - 1946", "1945 - 1928", "1927 +")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Education", fig.width=6, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Education 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(eisced2, greenvote, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- glm(greenvote ~ gndr*factor(eisced2) + factor(essround) + factor(cntry), family = binomial, weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(gndr = 0:1,
                                     eisced2 = 0:1,
                                     agea = mean(df$agea),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround), 
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry)))

df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
df_pred$fit <- df_pred2$fit
df_pred$lwr <- df_pred2$fit - 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred$upr <- df_pred2$fit + 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred <- df_pred %>%
  mutate(fit = plogis(fit),
         lwr = plogis(lwr),
         upr = plogis(upr))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = eisced2, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = fit), size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.1, 1.1), breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("Lower Education", "Higher Education")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r fig.cap="Occupation", fig.width=8, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Occupation 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(class8, greenvote, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- glm(greenvote ~ factor(class8)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), family = binomial, weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(class8 = 1:8, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))

df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
df_pred$fit <- df_pred2$fit
df_pred$lwr <- df_pred2$fit - 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred$upr <- df_pred2$fit + 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred <- df_pred %>%
  mutate(fit = plogis(fit),
         lwr = plogis(lwr),
         upr = plogis(upr))

df_pred$class8 <- factor(df_pred$class8, levels = c(1:8), 
                         labels = c("1 Self-Employed Professionals and Large Employers", "2 Small Business Owners", "3 Technical (Semi-)Professionals", "4 Production Workers", "5 (Associate) Managers", "6 Clerks", "7 Socio-Cultural (Semi-)Professionals", "8 Service Workers"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = class8, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Locality", fig.width=7, fig.height=4, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Locality 
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(domicil, greenvote, cntry, essround, anweight) 
m1 <- glm(greenvote ~ factor(domicil)*factor(gndr) + factor(cntry) + factor(essround), family = binomial, weights = anweight, data = df)
df_pred <- as.data.frame(expand.grid(domicil = 1:5, 
                                     gndr = 0:1,
                                     cntry = find_mode(df$cntry),
                                     essround = find_mode(df$essround)))

df_pred2 <- predict(m1, newdata = df_pred, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
df_pred$fit <- df_pred2$fit
df_pred$lwr <- df_pred2$fit - 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred$upr <- df_pred2$fit + 1.96 * df_pred2[["se.fit"]]
df_pred <- df_pred %>%
  mutate(fit = plogis(fit),
         lwr = plogis(lwr),
         upr = plogis(upr))

df_pred$domicil <- factor(df_pred$domicil, levels = c(1:5), 
                          labels = c("Big City", "Suburbs or Outskirts of Big City", "Town or Small City", "Country Village", "Farm or Home in Countryside"))

ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = domicil, y = fit, color = factor(gndr))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lwr , ymax = upr, color = factor(gndr)), size = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_light(base_size = 14) +
  labs(color = "Gender", fill = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(labels =c("Men", "Women"), values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#009E73", "#E69F00")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r fig.cap="Risk aversion", fig.width=6, fig.height=3, out.width='\\textwidth'}
# Risk taker
load(here::here("01_Data", "Ess1-11.R"))
df <- df %>%
  drop_na(ipadvnt, greenvote, cntry, essround, anweight)
